serverInfo.name: APIbase
serverInfo.title: APIbase — The API Hub for AI Agents
serverInfo.description: Unified MCP gateway to 125 tools across travel, places, maps, events, entertainment, music, health, finance, education, jobs, e-commerce, AI marketing, weather, and more. Pay-per-call via x402 micropayments.

tools.name: weather.conditions.current
tools.title: Get Current Weather
tools.description: Get current weather conditions for a location

location.description: City name, coordinates (lat,lon), or zip code

tools.name: weather.conditions.forecast
tools.title: Get Weather Forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast for a location

location.description: City name, coordinates (lat,lon), or zip code

type.description: Forecast granularity: hourly, daily, or both

tools.title: Get Weather Alerts
tools.description: Get active weather alerts for a location

tools.description: Get historical weather data for a location and date

tools.title: Get Air Quality
tools.description: Get air quality index for a location

tools.name: weather.conditions.compare
tools.title: Compare Weather

currency.description: Price currency ISO code (e.g. USD, EUR)

carrier_code.description: Airline IATA or ICAO code (e.g. AA, UAL)

origin.description: Origin airport IATA code (e.g. JFK, LAX)

destination.description: Destination airport IATA code (e.g. CDG, LHR)

distance_km.description: Max distance from destination in km

tools.description: Look up airport by name or code

tools.name: foursquare.places.search
tools.title: Search Places
tools.description: Search for places (restaurants, hotels, cafes, attractions) worldwide by name, category, or location (Foursquare)

near.description: Place name for geographic context (e.g. "Bangkok,Thailand", "New York,NY")

ll.description: Latitude,longitude (e.g. "13.7563,100.5018"). Use either near or ll, not both

categories.description: Comma-separated Foursquare category IDs to filter results

open_now.description: Filter to only places open now

tools.name: foursquare.places.details
tools.title: Get Place Details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a place — hours, rating, price, contact, categories (Foursquare)

tools.name: foursquare.places.tips
tools.title: Get Place Tips
tools.description: Get user tips and reviews for a place (Foursquare)

fsq_id.description: Foursquare place ID to get tips for

sort.description: Sort order for tips: popular, newest, or oldest

tools.name: foursquare.places.photos
tools.title: Get Place Photos
tools.description: Get photos for a place with size and classification options (Foursquare)

fsq_id.description: Foursquare place ID to get photos for

sort.description: Sort order for photos: popular or newest

tools.name: foursquare.places.autocomplete
tools.title: Autocomplete Places
tools.description: Get autocomplete suggestions for places, addresses, and searches (Foursquare)

radius.description: Bias radius in meters for location results

tools.name: ticketmaster.events.search
tools.title: Search Events
tools.description: Search for events (concerts, sports, theatre, festivals) by keyword, city, date, or category across 26+ countries (Ticketmaster)

city.description: City name to filter events (e.g. "New York", "London")

startDateTime.description: Start date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix (e.g. "2026-04-01T00:00:00Z")

endDateTime.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix (e.g. "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z")

size.description: Number of results per page (1-200, default 20)

tools.name: ticketmaster.events.details
tools.title: Get Event Details
tools.description: Get full details for an event — dates, venues, prices, images, classifications, seat map (Ticketmaster)

tools.name: ticketmaster.events.nearby
tools.title: Find Nearby Events
tools.description: Find events near geographic coordinates with radius filter (Ticketmaster)

startDateTime.description: Start date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix

endDateTime.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix

size.description: Number of results per page (1-200, default 20)

tools.name: ticketmaster.events.by_artist
tools.title: Get Artist Events
tools.description: Find events by artist or performer name with optional country and date filters (Ticketmaster)

attractionId.description: Ticketmaster attraction ID for exact artist match

startDateTime.description: Start date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix

endDateTime.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix

size.description: Number of results per page (1-200, default 20)

tools.name: ticketmaster.events.by_venue
tools.title: Get Venue Events
tools.description: Get upcoming events at a specific venue by venue ID (Ticketmaster)

venueId.description: Ticketmaster venue ID (e.g. "KovZpZA7AAEA" for Madison Square Garden)

keyword.description: Optional keyword filter for events at this venue

startDateTime.description: Start date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix

endDateTime.description: End date/time in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix

size.description: Number of results per page (1-200, default 20)

tools.name: ticketmaster.events.trending
tools.title: Get Trending Events
tools.description: Get trending and popular events sorted by relevance (Ticketmaster)

size.description: Number of results per page (1-200, default 20)

tools.name: ticketmaster.events.categories
tools.title: Get Event Categories
tools.description: Get all event classification categories — segments, genres, sub-genres (Ticketmaster)

size.description: Number of results per page (1-200, default 20)

tools.name: tmdb.movies.search
tools.title: Search Movies & TV
tools.description: Search for movies, TV shows, and people by name across 1M+ titles in 39 languages (TMDB)

query.description: Search query (movie, TV show, or person name)

include_adult.description: Include adult content in results (default false)

tools.name: tmdb.movies.details
tools.title: Get Movie Details
tools.description: Get full movie details — cast, crew, trailers, ratings, streaming providers, runtime, budget, revenue (TMDB)

id.description: TMDB movie ID (e.g. 550 for Fight Club, 27205 for Inception)

tools.name: tmdb.movies.discover
tools.title: Discover Movies & TV
tools.description: Discover movies or TV shows by genre, year, rating, language, and sort order (TMDB)

with_genres.description: Comma-separated genre IDs to filter (e.g. "28,12" for Action+Adventure)

primary_release_year.description: Filter by primary release year (movies only)

first_air_date_year.description: Filter by first air date year (TV only)

tools.name: tmdb.movies.trending
tools.title: Get Trending Movies & TV
tools.description: Get trending movies, TV shows, or people — daily or weekly (TMDB)

tools.name: tmdb.movies.similar
tools.title: Get Similar Movies
tools.description: Get movie recommendations based on a movie ID — similar genres, themes, cast (TMDB)

id.description: TMDB movie ID to get recommendations for

tools.name: tmdb.movies.person
tools.title: Search Person / Filmography
tools.description: Search for actors, directors, or crew by name, or get full filmography by person ID (TMDB)

query.description: Person name to search for (e.g. "Tom Hanks", "Miyazaki"). Use either query or id

id.description: TMDB person ID for detailed filmography (e.g. 31 for Tom Hanks). Use either id or query

page.description: Page number for search results (1-500, default 1)

tools.name: tmdb.movies.where_to_watch
tools.title: Where to Watch
tools.description: Find streaming, rental, and purchase options for a movie or TV show by country (TMDB)

id.description: TMDB movie or TV show ID

tools.name: health.nutrition.food_search
tools.title: Search Foods (USDA)
tools.description: Search 350K+ foods in the USDA FoodData Central database — nutrition facts, ingredients, branded products, and reference foods

query.description: Food search query (e.g. "chicken breast", "brown rice", "vitamin D milk")

data_type.description: USDA data type filter: "Foundation" (reference foods), "Branded" (brand-name products), "SR Legacy" (legacy reference), "all" (default)

brand_owner.description: Filter by brand owner name (e.g. "General Mills", "Tyson")

tools.name: health.nutrition.food_details
tools.title: Get Food Nutrition Details
tools.description: Get detailed nutrition data for a food item — up to 150 nutrients, portions, serving sizes, ingredients (USDA)

fdc_id.description: USDA FoodData Central food ID (e.g. 171705 for chicken breast)

tools.name: health.safety.drug_events
tools.title: Search Drug Adverse Events
tools.description: Search FDA FAERS database for drug adverse event reports — side effects, reactions, patient demographics (OpenFDA)

search.description: OpenFDA search query for adverse events (e.g. "patient.drug.medicinalproduct:aspirin", "patient.reaction.reactionmeddrapt:headache")

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

tools.name: health.safety.food_recalls
tools.title: Search Food Recalls
tools.description: Search FDA food enforcement and recall reports — contamination, mislabeling, safety alerts (OpenFDA)

search.description: OpenFDA search query for food recalls (e.g. "reason_for_recall:salmonella", "recalling_firm:"Tyson"")

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

tools.name: health.safety.drug_labels
tools.title: Search Drug Labels
tools.description: Search drug labeling data — indications, dosage, warnings, interactions, contraindications (OpenFDA)

search.description: OpenFDA search query for drug labels (e.g. "openfda.brand_name:ibuprofen", "openfda.generic_name:metformin", "drug_interactions:warfarin")

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

tools.name: health.supplements.search
tools.title: Search Dietary Supplements
tools.description: Search 200K+ dietary supplement labels in the NIH DSLD database — vitamins, minerals, herbal products

tools.name: health.supplements.details
tools.title: Get Supplement Label Details
tools.description: Get full supplement label data — ingredients, amounts per serving, daily values, target groups (NIH DSLD)

tools.name: finance.currency.rates
tools.title: Get Exchange Rates
tools.description: Get currency exchange rates for 200+ fiat and crypto currencies with optional historical dates (fawazahmed0 CDN)

base.description: Base currency code (e.g. "usd", "eur", "btc"). Lowercase. 200+ currencies supported.

date.description: Historical date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest rates.

currencies.description: Filter to specific target currencies (e.g. ["eur","gbp"]). Omit for all.

tools.name: finance.currency.ecb
tools.title: Get ECB Exchange Rates
tools.description: Get official European Central Bank reference exchange rates for ~33 fiat currencies (Frankfurter/ECB)

base.description: Base currency code, uppercase (e.g. "USD", "EUR"). ~33 ECB currencies.

date.description: Historical date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for latest ECB rates.

currencies.description: Filter to specific target currencies (e.g. ["EUR","GBP"]). Omit for all ECB currencies.

tools.name: finance.macro.indicator
tools.title: Get Economic Indicator
tools.description: Get US economic data from 816K+ FRED series — GDP, CPI, unemployment, interest rates, money supply (Federal Reserve)

series_id.description: FRED series ID (e.g. "GDP", "CPIAUCSL", "UNRATE", "DFF", "T10Y2Y"). Browse at fred.stlouisfed.org.

observation_start.description: Start date for observations in YYYY-MM-DD format.

observation_end.description: End date for observations in YYYY-MM-DD format.

limit.description: Maximum number of observations to return (default 100000).

sort_order.description: Sort order by observation date. Default "asc".

tools.name: finance.macro.country
tools.title: Get Country Economic Data
tools.description: Get global development indicators from World Bank — GDP, population, inflation, trade, poverty for 200+ countries

country_code.description: ISO 3166 country code (e.g. "US", "DE", "CHN") or "all" for all countries.

indicator_id.description: World Bank indicator ID (e.g. "NY.GDP.MKTP.CD" for GDP, "SP.POP.TOTL" for population, "FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG" for inflation).

date_range.description: Year or year range (e.g. "2023" or "2010:2023"). Omit for all available years.

tools.name: finance.treasury.data
tools.title: Get US Treasury Data
tools.description: Get US Treasury fiscal data — interest rates on federal debt, national debt, debt outstanding, gold reserves, exchange rates

endpoint.description: Treasury dataset endpoint: avg_interest_rates (interest rates on federal debt), debt_to_penny (daily national debt), debt_outstanding (debt by security type), top_federal (top federal spending), gold_reserve (US gold reserves), exchange_rates_report (Treasury exchange rates).

filter.description: Filter expression (e.g. "record_date:gte:2024-01-01,security_desc:eq:Treasury Bills"). See Treasury API docs.

page_size.description: Number of records per page (default 100, max 10000).

sort.description: Sort field with direction prefix (e.g. "-record_date" for newest first). Default: "-record_date".

tools.name: finance.banking.iban
tools.title: Validate IBAN
tools.description: Validate an IBAN number and get associated bank data — BIC/SWIFT code, bank name, city (OpenIBAN)

iban.description: IBAN to validate (e.g. "DE89370400440532013000"). Spaces are stripped automatically.

tools.name: music.artists.search
tools.title: Search Music Artists
tools.description: Search for music artists by name across 2M+ artists — biography, country, tags, aliases (MusicBrainz)

query.description: Search query for artist name (e.g. "Radiohead", "Miles Davis")

tools.name: music.artists.details
tools.title: Get Artist Details
tools.description: Get detailed artist info by MusicBrainz ID — tags, ratings, external links, life span, area (MusicBrainz)

tools.name: music.releases.search
tools.title: Search Music Releases
tools.description: Search for albums, singles, and EPs across 50M+ recordings — title, artist, date, tracklist (MusicBrainz)

query.description: Search query for release/album title (e.g. "OK Computer", "Kind of Blue"). Supports Lucene syntax: artist:"Radiohead" AND release:"OK Computer"

tools.name: music.releases.details
tools.title: Get Release Details
tools.description: Get full release details by MusicBrainz ID — tracklist, artist credits, labels, media formats (MusicBrainz)

mbid.description: MusicBrainz release ID (UUID format). Returns full tracklist, artist credits, and label info

tools.name: music.recordings.search
tools.title: Search Music Recordings
tools.description: Search for songs and recordings by title or artist — duration, release history, artist credits (MusicBrainz)

query.description: Search query for song/recording title (e.g. "Creep", "So What"). Supports Lucene syntax: artist:"Radiohead" AND recording:"Creep"

tools.name: music.discover.fresh
tools.title: Get Fresh Music Releases
tools.description: Discover recently released albums and singles from the past N days — trending new music (ListenBrainz)

days.description: Number of days to look back for fresh releases (1-90, default 7)

tools.name: music.radio.search
tools.title: Search Radio Stations
tools.description: Search 40K+ internet radio stations by name, genre, country, or language — streaming URLs, bitrate, codec (RadioBrowser)

name.description: Station name to search for (e.g. "BBC Radio", "Jazz FM")

tools.name: aster.exchange.info
tools.title: AsterDEX Exchange Info
tools.description: Get exchange information and available trading pairs on AsterDEX

symbol.description: Trading pair symbol to filter (e.g. BTCUSDT). Omit for all pairs.

tools.name: aster.markets.ticker
tools.title: AsterDEX Market Data
tools.description: Get 24-hour ticker statistics for trading pairs on AsterDEX

symbol.description: Trading pair symbol (e.g. BTCUSDT). Omit for all pairs.

tools.name: aster.markets.orderbook
tools.title: AsterDEX Order Book
tools.description: Get order book depth for a trading pair on AsterDEX

tools.name: aster.markets.klines
tools.title: AsterDEX Klines
tools.description: Get candlestick (OHLCV) data for a trading pair on AsterDEX

start_time.description: Start time in milliseconds since epoch

end_time.description: End time in milliseconds since epoch

tools.name: jobs.salary.data
tools.title: Get Salary Data
tools.description: Get US salary and employment timeseries data from BLS — wage estimates, employment counts, occupational statistics by SOC code and geography

series_ids.description: BLS timeseries IDs (e.g. ["OEUM0000000000000151252004"] for Software Developers mean salary). Encodes occupation code + geography + data type.

start_year.description: Start year (e.g. "2020"). Omit for latest available.

end_year.description: End year (e.g. "2024"). Omit for latest available.

tools.name: jobs.occupations.search
tools.title: Search Occupations
tools.description: Search O*NET occupation taxonomy by keyword — 1,000+ occupations with SOC codes, titles, and relevance scores

keyword.description: Search keyword for occupations (e.g. "software developer", "nurse", "data analyst").

start.description: Starting index for pagination (1-based). Omit for first page.

end.description: Ending index for pagination. Omit for default page size.

tools.name: jobs.occupations.details
tools.title: Get Occupation Details
tools.description: Get detailed occupation info from O*NET by SOC code — overview, skills, knowledge, abilities, technology skills, tasks

code.description: O*NET SOC occupation code (e.g. "15-1252.00" for Software Developers). Get codes from occupation_search.

section.description: Specific section to retrieve. Omit for general overview (title, description, sample titles).

tools.name: jobs.skills.search
tools.title: Search EU Skills & Occupations
tools.description: Search ESCO (European Skills/Competences/Occupations) taxonomy — occupations and skills in 27 EU languages

text.description: Search text for EU occupations or skills (e.g. "software developer", "project management").

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. "en", "de", "fr"). Default: "en". ESCO supports 27 EU languages.

offset.description: Offset for pagination. Omit for first page.

tools.name: jobs.skills.details
tools.title: Get EU Skill/Occupation Details
tools.description: Get ESCO resource details by URI — occupation descriptions, essential/optional skills, ISCO codes, skill relationships

uri.description: ESCO resource URI (e.g. "http://data.europa.eu/esco/occupation/..."). Get URIs from esco_search.

tools.name: jobs.listings.search
tools.title: Search Job Listings
tools.description: Search global job listings via CareerJet — title, company, salary, location, contract type across 90+ countries

keywords.description: Job search keywords (e.g. "software engineer", "marketing manager remote").

location.description: Location filter (e.g. "New York", "London", "Berlin"). Omit for worldwide.

work_hours.description: Filter by work hours: full_time or part_time

tools.name: education.papers.search
tools.title: Search Academic Papers
tools.description: Search 250M+ academic papers across all disciplines — citations, authors, institutions, open access status (OpenAlex)

query.description: Search text for academic papers (e.g. "machine learning", "CRISPR gene editing").

concept.description: OpenAlex concept ID filter (e.g. "C41008148" for Computer Science). Get IDs from OpenAlex concepts API.

author.description: Author name or ORCID to filter by (e.g. "Yoshua Bengio", "0000-0001-2345-6789").

institution.description: Institution name or ROR ID to filter by (e.g. "MIT", "Stanford University").

year_from.description: Filter papers published from this year (inclusive).

year_to.description: Filter papers published up to this year (inclusive).

open_access_only.description: If true, only return open access papers.

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

tools.name: education.papers.details
tools.title: Get Paper Details
tools.description: Get full details for an academic paper by OpenAlex ID or DOI — authors, citations, abstract, references, open access links (OpenAlex)

id.description: OpenAlex work ID (e.g. "W2741809807") or DOI (e.g. "10.1038/nature12373"). Get IDs from paper_search.

tools.name: education.colleges.search
tools.title: Search US Colleges
tools.description: Search US colleges and universities — admissions, tuition, enrollment, earnings, completion rates (College Scorecard)

name.description: School name to search for (e.g. "MIT", "Stanford", "Community College").

degree_type.description: Filter by predominant degree type awarded.

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

tools.name: education.colleges.details
tools.title: Get College Details
tools.description: Get detailed data for a US college by UNITID — admissions rate, costs, student outcomes, earnings after graduation (College Scorecard)

school_id.description: College Scorecard UNITID (e.g. 166027 for MIT). Get IDs from college_search.

tools.name: education.pubmed.search
tools.title: Search PubMed
tools.description: Search 36M+ biomedical and life science articles — clinical trials, reviews, meta-analyses with date and type filters (PubMed/NCBI)

query.description: Search text for biomedical literature (e.g. "COVID-19 vaccine efficacy", "BRCA1 breast cancer").

date_from.description: Start date filter in YYYY/MM/DD format (e.g. "2023/01/01").

date_to.description: End date filter in YYYY/MM/DD format (e.g. "2024/12/31").

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

tools.name: education.arxiv.search
tools.title: Search arXiv Preprints
tools.description: Search 2.4M+ preprints in physics, math, CS, biology, and more — full text, authors, categories, PDF links (arXiv)

query.description: Search text for preprints (e.g. "transformer architecture", "quantum computing").

limit.description: Number of results to return (1-50). Default: 10.

tools.name: education.crossref.doi
tools.title: Lookup DOI
tools.description: Resolve a DOI to full publication metadata — title, authors, journal, citations, funding, license (CrossRef)

tools.name: geo.address.geocode
tools.title: Geocode Address
tools.description: Convert an address, place name, or landmark to geographic coordinates (lat/lon) with structured address data (Geoapify/OSM)

text.description: Address, place name, or landmark to geocode (e.g. "1600 Pennsylvania Ave, Washington DC", "Eiffel Tower").

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter results (e.g. "US", "DE", "FR").

type.description: Filter by result type: city, street, amenity, or country.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 1, max 5).

tools.name: geo.address.reverse
tools.title: Reverse Geocode
tools.description: Convert geographic coordinates (lat/lon) to a structured address — street, city, country, postal code (Geoapify/OSM)

lat.description: Latitude of the point to reverse geocode.

lon.description: Longitude of the point to reverse geocode.

tools.name: geo.places.search
tools.title: Search Places & POI
tools.description: Search points of interest (restaurants, pharmacies, hotels, attractions) near a location by category and radius (Geoapify/OSM)

categories.description: POI category filter (e.g. "catering.restaurant", "healthcare.pharmacy", "tourism.attraction", "accommodation.hotel"). Multiple categories separated by comma.

lat.description: Center latitude for the search area.

lon.description: Center longitude for the search area.

tools.name: geo.address.autocomplete
tools.title: Autocomplete Address
tools.description: Get autocomplete suggestions as you type an address or place name — for real-time search UX (Geoapify/OSM)

text.description: Partial address or place name to autocomplete (e.g. "1600 Penn", "Berlin Bran").

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter results (e.g. "US", "DE").

type.description: Filter by result type: city, street, amenity, or country.

tools.name: geo.navigation.route
tools.title: Get Directions
tools.description: Get turn-by-turn driving, walking, cycling, or transit directions between two points with distance and time (Geoapify/OSM)

mode.description: Travel mode: drive, walk, bicycle, or transit. Default: drive.

units.description: Distance units: metric (km) or imperial (miles). Default: metric.

tools.name: geo.navigation.isochrone
tools.title: Get Isochrone
tools.description: Get reachability area (isochrone) — polygon showing how far you can travel from a point in a given time or distance (Geoapify/OSM)

mode.description: Travel mode: drive, walk, or bicycle. Default: drive.

time.description: Reachability time in seconds (default 900 = 15 min, max 7200 = 2h). Mutually exclusive with distance.

distance.description: Reachability distance in meters (max 100km). Mutually exclusive with time.

tools.name: geo.ip.geolocation
tools.title: IP Geolocation
tools.description: Geolocate an IP address (IPv4/IPv6) to country, city, coordinates, and network info (Geoapify)

ip.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to geolocate (e.g. "8.8.8.8", "2001:4860:4860::8888").

tools.name: aipush.website.setup
tools.title: Setup Website for AI Marketing
tools.description: Register a website and run Material Intelligence Pipeline (MIP) — crawls site, extracts business signals, analyzes competitors, builds AI-optimized content profile. Required before generating pages. DNS CNAME required: reference.{domain} → cname.aipush.app (AIPush)

website_domain.description: Domain of the website to register (e.g. "example.com", "myhotel.com"). Must have a CNAME record: reference.{domain} → cname.aipush.app

target_url.description: Target conversion URL — the single page all generated content will link to (e.g. "https://example.com/book", "https://myhotel.com/reserve"). Must be on the same domain.

tools.name: aipush.website.status
tools.title: Check Website Status
tools.description: Check MIP analysis status, DNS verification, SSL provisioning, billing status, and page generation progress for a registered website (AIPush)

tools.name: aipush.pages.generate
tools.title: Generate AI Marketing Page
tools.description: Generate one AI-optimized HTML page for a website — structured for AI assistant answer compilation (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). Page includes decision question, short answer with CTA, comparison, pricing, FAQ. Published at reference.{domain}/{slug} (AIPush)

website_domain.description: Domain of the website to generate a page for. Must be set up first via aipush.setup_website.

keyword.description: Target keyword or topic for the page (e.g. "best hotels in Bangkok", "affordable dentist near me"). If omitted, the system picks from the semantic coverage grid.

tools.name: aipush.pages.list
tools.title: List Generated Pages
tools.description: List all published AI marketing pages for a website with URLs, titles, and publish dates (AIPush)

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to return (default 20, max 100).

offset.description: Number of pages to skip for pagination (default 0).

tools.name: aipush.pages.content
tools.title: Get Page Content
tools.description: Get full HTML content and metadata of a specific generated page by slug (AIPush)

slug.description: Page slug identifier (e.g. "best-hotels-bangkok-2026"). Returned by aipush.list_pages or aipush.generate_page.

tools.name: aipush.analysis.profile
tools.title: Get Website Business Profile
tools.description: Get MIP business analysis results — business name, category, location, competitors, value propositions, and market surface data (AIPush)

website_domain.description: Domain to get the MIP business analysis for. Must have completed setup (mip_status = "ready").

tools.name: aipush.analysis.visibility
tools.title: Check AI Visibility Score
tools.description: Test whether AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini) know about and recommend a brand — returns per-model visibility scores (AIPush)

website_domain.description: Domain to check AI visibility for (e.g. "example.com"). Tests whether AI assistants know about and recommend this brand.

tools.name: zinc.products.search
tools.title: Search Products
tools.description: Search products across Amazon, Walmart, and other major retailers by keyword — titles, prices, ratings, images (Zinc)

tools.name: zinc.products.detail
tools.title: Get Product Details
tools.description: Get full product details by ASIN or product ID — title, description, brand, images, price, features, categories (Zinc)

tools.name: zinc.products.offers
tools.title: Get Product Offers
tools.description: Get all seller offers for a product — prices, shipping, condition, Prime eligibility, seller ratings (Zinc)

product_id.description: Product ID or ASIN to get seller offers for

tools.name: zinc.products.reviews
tools.title: Get Product Reviews
tools.description: Get product reviews and ratings by ASIN or product ID — review text, rating, author, verified purchase status (Zinc)

product_id.description: Product ID or ASIN to get reviews for

prompts.name: find_cheapest_flight
prompts.description: Search for the cheapest flights between two airports and confirm pricing

prompts.name: crypto_market_overview
prompts.description: Get a comprehensive overview of the cryptocurrency market

prompts.name: prediction_market_research
prompts.description: Research a topic on Polymarket prediction markets

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: Topic to research (e.g. US election, Bitcoin price)
